decisions.reasoning: Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Flutter Mane, allowing me to remove a major offensive threat immediately without risking a switch-in.

Since both Incineroars are at a stalemate and my Incineroar is at 51% HP, Parting Shot is the best way to pivot out, lower the opponent's stats, and bring in a stronger offensive threat like Calyrex-Ice or Flutter Mane to gain momentum.

My Incineroar is at 51% and cannot win the mirror match-up efficiently; switching to Calyrex-Ice allows me to pivot into a bulky threat that can threaten the opponent's team while preserving Incineroar for Intimidate utility later.

Calyrex-Ice is slower than Incineroar and will be 2HKOed by Flare Blitz while only dealing chip damage. Switching to my own Incineroar allows me to Intimidate the opponent and safely pivot or check their physical attackers.

My Incineroar is low on health and in a speed tie with the opponent's Incineroar. Using Parting Shot allows me to pivot out safely, lower the opponent's offensive stats, and bring in a fresh teammate to maintain momentum.

My Incineroar is at 33% HP and loses the speed tie/damage trade against the opponent's 82% HP Incineroar. Switching to Flutter Mane forces the opponent to respect the special threat and avoids losing my Incineroar to a chip-damage Flare Blitz or U-turn.

Incineroar threatens an OHKO with Flare Blitz and I cannot secure a KO this turn. Switching to my own Incineroar allows me to resist the incoming Flare Blitz and utilize Intimidate to mitigate damage.

My Incineroar is at low HP and cannot win the 1v1 against the opponent's Incineroar. Parting Shot allows me to pivot out safely, lower the opponent's stats, and bring in a healthier teammate to maintain momentum.

My Incineroar is at 26% and will likely be KO'd by any chip damage or a Flare Blitz; switching to Flutter Mane preserves my Incineroar for a potential Intimidate pivot later while forcing the opponent to react to a faster threat.

Flutter Mane is guaranteed to be OHKO'd by Flare Blitz and cannot secure a KO this turn. Switching to Incineroar provides a resistance to Fire-type moves, allowing me to safely pivot and preserve Flutter Mane for later.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, allowing me to remove a threat immediately regardless of their move choice.
Incineroar has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Calyrex-Ice resists Rillaboom's Grass-type moves and can threaten it with powerful Ice-type STAB.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom. Even if the opponent switches, the move will deal massive damage to whatever comes in, and staying in to secure the KO is the highest priority.
Calyrex-Ice has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Dragonite is the best choice to resist Rillaboom's Grass-type moves and threaten it back with STAB Flying or Tera-Normal Extreme Speed.
Mystical Fire is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom and allows me to secure the KO before Rillaboom can use Wood Hammer to OHKO Flutter Mane.

Flutter Mane is guaranteed to be OHKOed by Flare Blitz and cannot threaten a KO back. Switching to Dragonite provides a bulky pivot that resists Fire-type moves, allowing me to preserve Flutter Mane for later while scouting the opponent's next move.
